title: sida planicaulis
intro: Sida planicaulis, also known as the spreading sida or hairy sida, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin ailments. The health benefits of Sida planicaulis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
